overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring futuristic crew quarters on a spaceship or space station. The character moves through interconnected modular rooms with built-in sleeping pods, passing NPCs in a common area before entering a private quarters marked 'YANG'.

small black table with red cup and items
rounded doorway leading to common area

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a compact private quarters with a built-in sleeping pod featuring red bedding. The room has industrial metal walls and a small side table. The character turns and walks toward the exit doorway, transitioning toward a common area.

seated at table in conversation with another NPC

segments.scene_description: The character enters a common area with industrial metal flooring where two NPCs sit at a central table. Overhead fluorescent lighting illuminates the space. The character walks past the seated crew members toward an exit doorway on the far side of the room.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow connecting corridor with industrial metal walls. A sign reading 'YANG' is mounted on the right wall next to a storage locker. The character approaches and enters the open doorway at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: private quarters labeled YANG with multiple sleeping pods

character turns to examine different sleeping pods in the room

built-in sleeping pod with purple pillow and blue blanket
rectangular white storage container on floor
white desk with chair and items on surface

segments.scene_description: The character enters the YANG private quarters, a room similar to the first but with different colored bedding—one pod with green sheets and another with a purple pillow. The room contains multiple storage containers and a desk. The character explores the space, walking around the sleeping pods and examining the layout before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of modular spaceship quarters, transitioning from one private room through a communal hub and into another personal living space. It begins inside a compact private room with a red-bedded sleeping pod, moving toward the exit as the character leaves the industrial metal walls behind. As the camera enters a brightly lit common area, it glides past two crew members seated at a central table under fluorescent lighting before proceeding through a far doorway. The scene then shifts into a narrow connecting corridor, passing a storage locker and a sign reading YANG, which leads directly into a second set of private quarters. Finally, the camera explores this new room, weaving around sleeping pods with green and purple bedding and passing various storage containers and a desk.
